_meta.description: Curated, insertable Klipper config / macro templates for the Config Templates library.

templates.name: PRINT_START
templates.description: A start sequence the slicer calls at print start: home, optional bed mesh, heat soak, and a purge line. Pass bed/extruder temps from your slicer's start G-code as PRINT_START EXTRUDER=... BED=...
templates.body:
[gcode_macro PRINT_START]
gcode:
    {% set bed = params.BED|default(60)|float %}
    {% set extruder = params.EXTRUDER|default(200)|float %}
    M140 S{bed}
    M104 S150            ; warm nozzle without oozing
    G28                  ; home all axes
    M190 S{bed}          ; wait for bed
    BED_MESH_CALIBRATE   ; comment out if you have no probe
    M109 S{extruder}     ; wait for nozzle
    G90
    G1 Z5 F3000
    ; purge line
    G1 X5 Y5 Z0.3 F6000
    G92 E0
    G1 X120 Y5 E15 F1200
    G92 E0

templates.name: PRINT_END
templates.description: An end sequence: retract, lift, present the print, and turn off heaters and motors.
templates.body:
[gcode_macro PRINT_END]
gcode:
    M400                 ; finish moves
    G91
    G1 E-2 F2700         ; retract
    G1 Z10 F3000         ; lift
    G90
    G1 X5 Y200 F6000     ; present
    M104 S0
    M140 S0
    M106 S0
    M84                  ; motors off

templates.name: PAUSE / RESUME / CANCEL
templates.description: Pause/resume that parks the toolhead and restores position, plus a cancel that runs PRINT_END. Requires [pause_resume] and [respond] enabled.
templates.body:
[gcode_macro PAUSE]
rename_existing: BASE_PAUSE
gcode:
    {% set z = params.Z|default(10)|float %}
    SAVE_GCODE_STATE NAME=pause_state
    BASE_PAUSE
    G91
    G1 E-2 F2700
    G1 Z{z} F900
    G90
    G1 X5 Y5 F6000

[gcode_macro RESUME]
rename_existing: BASE_RESUME
gcode:
    G91
    G1 E2 F2700
    G90
    RESTORE_GCODE_STATE NAME=pause_state MOVE=1
    BASE_RESUME

[gcode_macro CANCEL_PRINT]
rename_existing: BASE_CANCEL_PRINT
gcode:
    PRINT_END
    BASE_CANCEL_PRINT

templates.name: LOAD / UNLOAD_FILAMENT
templates.description: Heat-gated load and unload helpers. Adjust the lengths for your extruder-to-nozzle path.
templates.body:
[gcode_macro LOAD_FILAMENT]
gcode:
    {% set temp = params.TEMP|default(220)|float %}
    M109 S{temp}
    M83
    G1 E50 F300          ; feed to nozzle
    G1 E25 F150          ; slow purge
    M82

[gcode_macro UNLOAD_FILAMENT]
gcode:
    {% set temp = params.TEMP|default(220)|float %}
    M109 S{temp}
    M83
    G1 E5 F300           ; tip forming
    G1 E-50 F1800        ; retract out
    M82

templates.name: M600 (filament change)
templates.description: Mid-print filament change: pause, then use UNLOAD/LOAD and RESUME from the console.
templates.body:
[gcode_macro M600]
gcode:
    {% set x = params.X|default(50)|float %}
    {% set y = params.Y|default(5)|float %}
    PAUSE
    G91
    G1 E-2 F2700
    G90
    G1 X{x} Y{y} F6000
    UNLOAD_FILAMENT

templates.name: [input_shaper]
templates.description: Input shaping section. Fill in shaper_type/shaper_freq from a resonance test (see the Input Shaping widget), or leave commented until measured.

templates.name: [firmware_retraction]
templates.description: Firmware retraction so G10/G11 (and slicer firmware retraction) work. Tune the length for direct vs bowden.

templates.name: [exclude_object]
templates.description: Enables object exclusion so a failed object can be skipped mid-print (slicer must emit object labels).

templates.name: [gcode_arcs]
templates.description: Enables G2/G3 arc moves. Lower resolution = smoother arcs (more segments).

templates.name: [bed_mesh] (basic)
templates.description: A starting bed mesh. Set mesh_min/mesh_max to your probeable area (account for probe offsets) and probe_count to taste.
templates.body:
[bed_mesh]
speed: 120
horizontal_move_z: 5
mesh_min: 20, 20
mesh_max: 200, 200
probe_count: 5, 5
algorithm: bicubic
fade_start: 1
fade_end: 10

templates.name: [save_variables]
templates.description: Persists variables across restarts (used by many macros). Points at a file Klipper can write.

templates.name: [idle_timeout]
templates.description: Turns off heaters/motors after an idle period. Raise the timeout if long heat-soaks trip it.
